raw_consumer_statement: I purchased an item which I returned. Tracking shows returned item was received on XX/XX/year>, and I received an email stating the returned item was received and a refund would be issued. Refund was not issued. I have called in excess of 4 times trying to get this resolved. Amount of refund should be {$61.00}. I now have accrued interest even though I have called trying to rectify this issue several times. My balance is now {$63.00}. It will gain {$2.00} per cycle. I will not pay this because it should have been refunded. I would like all charges waived once this is straightened out.
